📡 Digital Imaging Now Available

Digital X-Ray, Ultrasound

🏠 Home Sample Collection

Can't Visit? We Come
to Your Doorstep

Our trained phlebotomists collect blood samples at your home across Munshiganj Sadar, Mirkadim, Sirajdikhan and Gazaria. Call to schedule a visit.

📞 Schedule Home Collection

Latest Updates

Notices & Announcements

NEW
New high-resolution Digital X-Ray unit installed. Enhanced imaging quality with reports available within 30 minutes under expert supervision.
📅 March 2026
OFFER
Ramadan Special: 20% discount on all blood test panels for patients referred by local mosque committees. Valid throughout Ramadan 1447 AH.
📅 February 2026
UPDATE
Dr. Nasrin Akter (Gynaecology) schedule updated — now available Sunday, Tuesday & Thursday evenings from 4:00 PM to 8:00 PM.
📅 February 2026
SERVICE
Home sample collection service now extended to Mirkadim, Gazaria and Sirajdikhan upazila. Call 01819-474144 to schedule a visit.
📅 January 2026
NOTICE
Eid holiday schedule: Lab will remain open 9:00 AM – 2:00 PM on Eid days for emergency diagnostic services only.
📅 January 2026

Who We Are

About Shopnonir Diagnostic Lab

Established in 2008, Shopnonir Diagnostic Lab has become Munshiganj Sadar's most trusted destination for accurate and affordable diagnostics — located at ১৯০ নং পৌর মার্কেট, ২য় তলা (কৃষি ব্যাংকের পূর্ব পার্শ্বে).

Our laboratory is staffed by qualified technicians and specialist physicians, equipped with calibrated instruments and quality-certified reagents ensuring every result meets the highest standards of accuracy.

🎯
Accurate & Reliable Results
ISO-compliant instruments and certified reagents for every test.
⏱️
Fast Report Delivery
Same-day & next-day reports. Digital delivery via WhatsApp.
💰
Affordable Pricing
Transparent fees with no hidden charges. Concessions available.
👩
Patient-Friendly Facilities
Separate waiting area for women. Air-conditioned premises.
